programs.title: The Landlord
programs.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programs.title: The Duplicate
programs.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programs.title: Revenge Of Robert
programs.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.
